title: ERC-8242 Spatial Identity
description: Off-chain spatial identity object for on-chain agents following ERC-8242.

spatial.description: H3 spatial identity declaration. If absent, the agent is treated as execution_preference=global.

h3_index.description: H3 cell identifier string (e.g. '8928308280fffff'). Must be a valid H3 cell.

resolution.description: H3 resolution integer (0=global ~4,250,547 km² to 15=local ~0.9 m²). Recommended: 5 (~252 km²).

execution_preference.description: Routing hint for task assignment scope. Consumers MUST treat as non-binding. Default: global.
